rationale: The initial alert (A0) shows `cmd.exe` being spawned by `java.exe` to download an executable (`qSwUwejx.exe`) using `certutil.exe` from a suspicious IP (10.0.2.13:8080) and execute it (EV-003, EV-006). This downloaded executable then establishes a network connection to a different suspicious IP and port (10.0.2.13:4444) (EV-007). Subsequently, another `certutil.exe` command is executed to download AnyDesk.exe from a legitimate source, indicating potential post-exploitation activity (EV-011).
